CVE-2023-50966.title: erlang-jose (aka JOSE for Erlang and Elixir) through 1.11.6 allow ...
CVE-2023-50966.description: erlang-jose (aka JOSE for Erlang and Elixir) through 1.11.6 allow attackers to cause a denial of service (CPU consumption) via a large p2c (aka PBES2 Count) value in a JOSE header.
